title: Spec frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of a spec's spec.md (harness mode, feature-development workflow).

id.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated spec id. Must match the spec folder name.

project.description: The project id this spec belongs to. Must match the containing project folder.

status.description: Spec lifecycle from the closed set. 'accepted' satisfies the workflow's approved-spec gate; 'draft' does not authorize downstream steps.
